sites.context: workInProgress.flags |= Snapshot; // bail-out path: props/state unchanged this render but differ from committed values, getSnapshotBeforeUpdate defined
workInProgress.flags |= Snapshot; // shouldUpdate=true path: component will re-render and has getSnapshotBeforeUpdate
workInProgress.flags |= Snapshot; // shouldUpdate=false path: shouldComponentUpdate returned false but props/state changed since last commit, getSnapshotBeforeUpdate defined

purpose: The Snapshot flag marks a class component Fiber so that the reconciler's before-mutation commit phase calls the component's getSnapshotBeforeUpdate lifecycle—capturing a DOM snapshot before any mutations are applied—and passes the return value to componentDidUpdate.
